title: Fix delete post and reply — dialog closes without deleting

requirements.text: Fix the delete post mutation in VideoPostCard so that confirming the Delete dialog actually calls the backend deleteVideoPost function, awaits the result, and invalidates/removes the post from the query cache. The dialog must only close after the deletion succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Delete in the Delete Post confirmation dialog removes the post from the backend.
The post disappears from the feed/UI immediately after the dialog closes.
If the delete call fails, the dialog stays open or shows an error; the post is not removed from the UI.

requirements.text: Fix the delete reply mutation in VideoReplyCard so that confirming the Delete dialog actually calls the backend deleteVideoReply function, awaits the result, and invalidates/removes the reply from the query cache. The dialog must only close after the deletion succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Delete in the Delete Reply confirmation dialog removes the reply from the backend.
The reply disappears from the UI immediately after the dialog closes.
If the delete call fails, the dialog stays open or shows an error; the reply is not removed from the UI.

requirements.text: Audit the useDeleteVideoPost and useDeleteVideoReply mutation hooks in useQueries.ts to ensure they correctly reference the backend actor methods (e.g., actor.deleteVideoPost / actor.deleteVideoReply), pass the correct post/reply ID argument, and call queryClient.invalidateQueries or optimistically remove the item on success.
acceptanceCriteria: The mutation hooks call the correct backend actor methods with the correct ID.
On mutation success, affected query caches are invalidated so the deleted item no longer appears.
No silent failures — errors from the backend surface as mutation errors.

constraints: Do not change the backend delete function signatures or data models.
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding undo/restore functionality for deleted posts or replies.
Changing the visual design of the delete confirmation dialog.
